log.context:
Both operations completed successfully:

1. **temporal-worker.service** — restarted cleanly, active and running (PID 3262531). All dependent workflows (heartbeat, simplify cron, congress audit, etc.) reconnected without issue. Memory at 97.4M, no errors in logs.

2. **commons-v2 lab** — old process (PID 3241315) on port 8107 was killed, new process started (PID 3265025) via `nohup bun run src/index.ts`. HTTP check returned `200` — lab is up and responding normally.
